chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2337 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2018 and it came up in Court once on 03.07.2018 when notices were ordered to be issued to the respondents and A.A.G. Thereafter, the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition, which shows his lack of interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
